pool.baseline: it just feels like such a waste of energy sometimes. like, we spend our whole lives just trying to survive, build things, find meaning, but in the grand scheme of the universe, none of it actually matters. we're just brief flickers of consciousness in a void that doesn't care. what's even the point of trying to keep going when everything is just destined to be forgotten?

pool.baseline: i just feel like im drowning and everyone else is struggling to stay afloat because of me. everything is so expensive and my wife is working two jobs just to keep us in this house while i just sit here feeling useless. i look at my kids and i just feel like i'm stealing from their future.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just… gone. like everything i built, everyone i knew, it’s all just evaporated. i look in the mirror and i don’t even recognize the person staring back. what’s even the point of waking up tomorrow when the person who actually lived my life doesn't exist anymore?

pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep expecting to hear him in the other room or the kettle whistling, but then i remember. the house feels like a tomb. i don't know how people are supposed to just... keep going. everything feels so empty and pointless.
